metadata.note: The France-Sahel rupture: severed diplomatic ties, the DGSE agent jailed for 20 years, France blamed for the Niamey airport attack, diplomats pulled, citizens told to leave. Dyad AND -- centroid_ids {AFRICA-SAHEL, EUROPE-FRANCE} with primary_target=AFRICA-SAHEL. At TITLE level primary_target is a hard AND (bootstrap link_titles), so EUROPE-FRANCE on the OR-gate is a no-op there; it is kept for EVENT-level recall, where one member title can supply the centroid and the 50%-of-titles rule still filters. Pre-audited against AFRICA-SAHEL alone (the real effective title gate) -- NOT against the OR-gate, which showed 98% foreign on 'ambassador' (Ramaphosa's envoy) and pulled a French hospital story on 'evacuate'. DROPPED: expel/Francafrique/severed/troops withdrawal/Quai d'Orsay/ingérence/espionnage-fr (0 hits), Barkhane (0 -- the operation that named the retired atomic is absent from the corpus), evacuate (1, and it was Ghana), embassy (5, 80% foreign -- Russian and Chinese embassies), ambassador EN (1, and it was Russia's).
